name: clemcore
summary: The cLLM (chat-optimized Large Language Model, 'clem') framework tests such models' ability to engage in games, that is, rule-constituted activities played using language.
author_email: Philipp Sadler <first.last@uni-potsdam.de>, Jonathan Jordan <first.last@uni-potsdam.de>, Sherzod Hakimov <first.last@uni-potsdam.de>, Anne Beyer <first.last@uni-potsdam.de>, "L. Pfennigschmidt" <first.last@uni-potsdam.de>, Kushal Koshti <first.last@uni-potsdam.de>
